item.title: David Duchovny 开播客咯
Van Rysel EDR CF105
item.description:
没啥特别想说的，晒一下我的小车车。

23年11月10日在迪卡侬大郊亭店提的，型号是Van Rysel EDR CF 105。

这是一辆耐力圈刹车，喜欢圈刹车的轻量，好维护和稍有滞后的刹车手感。平时匀速25km/h的老年人正好合适。

item.title: About
item.description:
Professional Summary

Dynamic IT and Digital Transformation Director with 12 years of progressive experience driving organizational efficiency. Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams, optimizing IT service delivery, and implementing scalable digital platforms. Bilingual in English (TEM8) and German (PGG).

Core Competencies

  • IT Strategy: Infrastructure Management, Cloud & Data Governance (ISO27001).
  • Digitalization: ERP/CRM/SCRM Implementation, Process Automation (RPA).
  • Operations: ITSM Service Management, Vendor & Procurement Management.
  • Innovation: AI Tools Adoption & Productivity Enablement.

Professional Experience

Director, Digital Publishing Information Center

Beijing Jieli Culture & Art Co., Ltd. | Aug 2024 – Apr 2025

  • Led IT & Digital Operations transformation, reducing departmental cost by 30%.
  • Implemented Feishu-based ITSM and OA systems, doubling IT support efficiency.
  • Managed corporate network architecture and data center operations.

Director of IT & Digitalization

Beijing HUBS Education Technology Co., Ltd. | Oct 2021 – Aug 2024

  • Automated over 40 business processes via Lark (Feishu), enhancing workflow efficiency by 40%+.
  • Built IT infrastructure, asset management systems, and SOP frameworks.
  • Introduced company-wide AI tool adoption and managed ¥30M+ enterprise projects.

Director of Digital Business / Product Manager

Shanghai Translation Publishing House | Jul 2013 – Dec 2020

  • Scaled annual digital revenue from CNY 20k to CNY 4.3M.
  • Established multi-channel distribution networks with Amazon, JD.com, and Tencent.
  • Launched “Yiwen Books” App, winner of the 3rd China Creative Industry Innovation Award.

Education

  • Shanghai International Studies University (SISU)
    • Bachelor’s Degree in German Literature | 2008 – 2013
  • Language Skills: English (TEM8), German (PGG), Chinese (Native).

Key Projects

Enterprise CRM System (Project Lead)

Designed and implemented a Lark-based business management system tracking 800+ clients and 180+ business opportunities, facilitating the planning of ¥100M in potential business.

“Stay curious, stay evolving.”
